channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watching This On TV May Actually Boost Your Well-Being, Study Finds
item.description: A win for sports lovers.

item.title: These 3 Habits Are Secretly Weakening Your Nails (& What To Do Instead)
item.description: Growing long and strong nails isn't easy for everyone—but it is possible.

item.title: UPDATE: Global Entry shuts down, but TSA PreCheck won't be suspended
item.description: The TSA plans to keep PreCheck open after reports suggested the fast-tracked lanes could be closed amid the federal government shutdown.

item.title: Rebecca Gayheart Reacts To Outpouring of Support After Eric Dane's Death

item.title: Quantonation’s double-sized second fund shows quantum still has believers
item.description: Quantonation Ventures, a venture firm investing in quantum and physics-based startups, has closed its oversubscribed second fund at €220 million, or a...

item.title: Guess Who This Movie Star-Turned-Talk Show Host Is!!!
item.description: There are only a handful of stars who’ve been grinding since childhood -- and we’ve got one right here ... guess who! We’ll give you some clues ... sh...

item.title: China’s brain-computer interface industry is racing ahead
item.description: China’s brain-computer interface industry is rapidly scaling from research to commercialization, driven by strong policy support, expanding clinical t...

item.title: What Is Coconut Sugar? Here's The Deal On This Cane Sugar Alternative
item.description: If you're eager to sample some other sweet options besides cane sugar, coconut sugar may be a healthy alternative.

item.title: Puerto Vallarta, Mexico Under Siege After Army Kills Major Cartel Leader

item.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
item.description: “As the children grew, life became more complicated.”

item.title: How To Find Meaning In A World That's Moving Too Fast
item.description: It's simpler than you think.

item.title: My ex-wife took out a $100K Parent PLUS loan for our son. Am I morally or legally obliged to pay it off?
item.description: “Our son makes $45,000 a year and has no immediate prospects for significantly increasing his income.”

item.title: 6 days left to lock in the lowest TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 rates

item.title: A Neurologist-Approved Trick For Using Technology More Mindfully
item.description: A simple suggestion to "reduce your screen time" might not be possible (or effective) for everyone.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Waymo makes its defense
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

item.title: Trump says Netflix will face ‘consequences’ if it doesn’t fire board member Susan Rice
item.description: Netflix board member Susan Rice had predicted that corporations that “take a knee” to Trump will be “held accountable” when Democrats return to power.

item.title: Last week’s slump in asset-manager stocks was driven by private-credit fears. Here’s what’s worrying investors.
item.description: Shares of asset managers fell due to worries over a private-credit fund managed by Blue Owl Capital, triggering broader anxiety about spillover effect...

item.title: Miley Cyrus Spotted Filming 'Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special' in Malibu
item.description: Miley Cyrus just turned Malibu into a full-blown "Hannah Montana" time capsule. The singer was photographed cruising along the Southern California coa...

item.title: Tariffs costs and refunds take the spotlight as Home Depot, TJX and other retailers report earnings this week
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down most of the Trump administration’s tariffs, but uncertainty remains for store chains.

item.title: ‘I won’t take out a loan’: I need $18K in house repairs. Do I take it from my Roth, 401(k) or IRA?
item.description: “I plan to be debt-free in less than two years.”

item.title: The 13 best places to travel solo in 2026
item.description: From Thailand to Chile to New Zealand, here are 13 incredible places to travel solo.

item.title: I booked a luxury staycation — and somehow came out $1 ahead
item.description: I booked a luxury staycation with American Express Fine Hotels + Resorts for less cash. Here's how I searched for a hotel and used my Amex Platinum's ...

item.title: United's new MileagePlus reality: Cardholders win, others lose ground
item.description: United Airlines shook up its loyalty program this week with new incentives for credit cardholders, and hurdles for those who don't carry a card.
